mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ReshQstnDAO.listReshPage 설 명 : 설문 페이지 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.RESCH_PAGE_CD AS reschPageCd , A.SRVY_ID AS reschCd , A.RESCH_PAGE_TITLE AS reschPageTitle , A.RESCH_PAGE_ARTL AS reschPageArtl , A.RESCH_PAGE_ODR AS reschPageOdr FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_PAGE A WHERE A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} ORDER BY RESCH_PAGE_ODR

/* SQL ID : ReshQstnDAO.listReshQstn 설 명 : 설문 페이지별 문항 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.RESCH_PAGE_CD AS reschPageCd , A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AS reschQstnCd , A.RESCH_QSTN_TYPE_CD AS reschQstnTypeCd , (SELECT MAX(AA.CDNM) FROM TB_ORG_CODE AA WHERE AA.CTGRCD = 'RESCH_QSTN_TYPE_CD' AND AA.CD = A.RESCH_QSTN_TYPE_CD) AS reschQstnTypeNm , A.RESCH_QSTN_TITLE AS reschQstnTitle , A.RESCH_QSTN_CTS AS reschQstnCts , A.REQ_CHOICE_YN AS reqChoiceYn , A.ETC_OPNNYN AS etcOpinionYn , A.MVMN_CHCYN AS jumpChoiceYn , A.RESCH_SCALE_LVL AS reschScaleLvl , A.RESCH_QSTN_ODR AS reschQstnOdr , B.RESCH_PAGE_ODR AS reschPageOdr , ( SELECT AA.MVMN_PAGE FROM SRVY_VWITM AA WHERE AA.SRVY_QSTN_ID = A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND AA.ETC_INPT_USEYN = 'Y' ) AS etcJumpPage , ( SELECT AA.SRVY_VWITM_ID FROM SRVY_VWITM AA WHERE AA.SRVY_QSTN_ID = A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND AA.ETC_INPT_USEYN = 'Y' ) AS etcItemCd FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_PAGE B ON A.RESCH_PAGE_CD = B.RESCH_PAGE_CD WHERE A.RESCH_PAGE_CD = #{reschPageCd} ORDER BY A.RESCH_QSTN_ODR

/* SQL ID : ReshQstnDAO.listReshQstnItem 설 명 : 설문 문항 아이템 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AS reschQstnCd , A.SRVY_VWITM_ID AS reschQstnItemCd , A.RESCH_QSTN_ITEM_TITLE AS reschQstnItemTitle , A.MVMN_PAGE AS jumpPage , A.VWITM_SEQ AS itemOdr , A.ETC_INPT_USEYN AS etcItemYn FROM SRVY_VWITM A WHERE A.SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{reschQstnCd} ORDER BY A.VWITM_SEQ

/* SQL ID : ReshQstnDAO.listReshScale 설 명 : 설문 문항 척도 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AS reschQstnCd , A.SRVY_SCALE_CD AS reschScaleCd , A.EVL_TTL AS scaleTitle , A.EVL_SCR AS scaleScore , A.SCALE_ODR AS scaleOdr FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_SCALE A WHERE A.SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{reschQstnCd} ORDER BY A.SCALE_ODR

/* SQL ID : ReshQstnDAO.selectReshQstn 설 명 : 설문 문항 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AS reschQstnCd , A.RESCH_PAGE_CD AS reschPageCd , A.RESCH_QSTN_TYPE_CD AS reschQstnTypeCd , A.RESCH_QSTN_TITLE AS reschQstnTitle , A.RESCH_QSTN_CTS AS reschQstnCts , A.RESCH_QSTN_ODR AS reschQstnOdr , A.REQ_CHOICE_YN AS reqChoiceYn , A.ETC_OPNNYN AS etcOpinionYn , A.MVMN_CHCYN AS jumpChoiceYn , A.RESCH_SCALE_LVL AS reschScaleLvl , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , ( SELECT AA.MVMN_PAGE FROM SRVY_VWITM AA WHERE AA.SRVY_QSTN_ID = A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND AA.ETC_INPT_USEYN = 'Y' ) AS etcJumpPage , ( SELECT AA.SRVY_VWITM_ID FROM SRVY_VWITM AA WHERE AA.SRVY_QSTN_ID = A.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND AA.ETC_INPT_USEYN = 'Y' ) AS etcItemCd FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN A WHERE A.SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{reschQstnCd}

/* SQL ID : ReshQstnDAO.selectReshPage 설 명 : 설문 페이지 조회 */ SELECT A.RESCH_PAGE_CD AS reschPageCd , A.SRVY_ID AS reschCd , A.RESCH_PAGE_TITLE AS reschPageTitle , A.RESCH_PAGE_ARTL AS reschPageArtl , A.RESCH_PAGE_ODR AS reschPageOdr FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_PAGE A WHERE A.RESCH_PAGE_CD = #{reschPageCd}
